errorCommand:
❌  There was an error executing this command!

Please, report it on https://discord.com/invite/p8CDnWHZJq

userNotFoundOnDataBaseContent: ❌ User <@{user}> not found in the database.
succesfulDeletedUserContent: ✅ User <@{user}> has been successfully deleted from the database.
amountErrorNegativeNumberContent: ❌  The amount must be a positive number.
userNotHaveMoney: ❌  The user does not have enough balance to remove that amount.
succesfulRemoveMoney: {amount} 💰 has been successfully removed from {user}'s balance.

cooldownTimeContentWork: ❌ You need to wait **{minutes}m {seconds}s** before collecting your work reward again.
cooldownActiveSecondsContent: ❌ You need to wait {seconds} seconds before playing roulette again
nothingToSellContent: ❌ You do not have any items to sell.
errorBalloonSellContent: ❌ You do not have enough balloons. You only have {balloon}.
errorMobileSellContent: ❌ You do not have enough mobiles. You only have {mobile}.

errorEnoughMoneyContent: ❌ You do not have enough money to place this bet.

deleteAccountStep1: Are you sure you want to delete your account? Please type **confirm** to proceed.
deleteAccountStep2: You have confirmed. Please type **confirm** again to permanently delete your account.

sameLang: ❌ The language cannot be the same as what is already established.

deleteuser.name: deleteuser
deleteuser.description: 🗑️ Delete a user from the database (only for the bot creator).

addmoney.name: addmoney
addmoney.description: 💵 Add money to a user (only for the creator of the bot).

language.name: language
language.description: 🌐 Change the language of the bot.

removemoney.name: removemoney
removemoney.description: 💸 Eliminates money from a user's balance (only for the creator of the bot).

daily.name: daily
daily.description: 🎁 Collect your daily reward of 10,000 coins.

sell.name: sell
sell.description: 💰 Sell your balloons and mobiles to get coins.

crash.name: crash
crash.description: 💥 Play Crash and bet to win.

race.name: race
race.description: 🏇 Bet on a horse race and win big.

rps.name: rps
rps.description: ✂️ Play Rock, Paper or Scissors with a bet.

slot.name: slot
slot.description: 🎰 Play the slot machine with a bet.

deleteaccount.name: deleteaccount
deleteaccount.description: ❌ Permanently delete your account and all associated data.

inventory.name: inventory
inventory.description: 📦 View your inventory or that of another user.

profile.name: profile
profile.description: 👤 Check a user's profile, including balance and statistics.

top.name: top
top.description: 🏆 Show the top 10 players with the highest money or highest level.

suggest.name: suggest
suggest.description: 💬 Send a suggestion to the support channel.
